content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the car positioned slightly right of center on what appears to be a gentle right-hand bend beginning.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 18, target = (18 + 5) % 121 = 23
- Target waypoint 23: (6.5025, 0.7188)
- Car: x=5.6288, y=0.6335, heading=-1.692°
- dy = 0.7188 - 0.6335 = 0.0853
- dx = 6.5025 - 5.6288 = 0.8737
- bearing = atan2(0.0853, 0.8737) = 5.58°
- delta = 5.58° - (-1.692°) = 7.27°
- |delta| ≈ 7.3° → slight left, use 5° steering

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but target waypoint 23 is slightly left of current heading (delta=+7.3°), so apply small positive steering to stay on the waypoint line before the right bend begins.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight section heading due east (~0° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 24-32 (x=6.5-7.3, y=0.7-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width is ~0.76m; car is slightly right of center (0.05m)",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP24-25",
    "Car holding steady at ~-1.7° heading on straight — nearly on course",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.380, 5.430, 5.530, 5.580, 5.629],
    "y": [0.6410, 0.6392, 0.6367, 0.6350, 0.6335],
    "yaw": [-1.540, -1.591, -1.603, -1.650, -1.692]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP23 at (6.503, 0.719): dy=0.085, dx=0.874, bearing=5.58°, delta=+7.27° → slight left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
